mechanism_narrative: A persistent decline in the federal funds rate reduces the risk-free discount rate, directly boosting equity valuations over the subsequent month.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns do not significantly exceed baseline when FEDFUNDS declines for three consecutive months (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate falls below 4.5%, tight labor markets accelerate wage growth, prompting the Federal Reserve to hike rates aggressively, which compresses equity multiples and drives negative forward returns.
evidence_refs: fact:2017 UNRATE vintage at 4.7% approaching threshold
failure_condition: SPX 60-day forward returns are positive or neutral in >50% of instances where UNRATE drops below 4.5%.

mechanism_narrative: Strong consumer credit expansion combined with rising industrial production signals robust aggregate demand outpacing supply constraints, driving corporate earnings growth and positive equity returns.
failure_condition: Rank IC between the RSAFS-INDPRO composite signal and 20-day SPX returns remains below 0.02 over a 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: In a rising inflation environment, real yields increase as nominal rates lag price growth, increasing the discount rate on long-duration assets and depressing equity valuations.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL rises > 0.2% MoM for two consecutive months
failure_condition: Forward 60-day returns are positive in >60% of triggered episodes despite rising CPI and lagging FEDFUNDS.

mechanism_narrative: Steady month-over-month growth in total nonfarm payrolls reflects underlying economic momentum, supporting corporate revenue forecasts and driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next week.
failure_condition: Weekly forward returns show no significant positive correlation with PAYEMS growth rates (p > 0.10).

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts exceeding 1.3 million annualized units signal strong construction activity and consumer confidence, leading to positive equity returns over the following month as related sectors rally.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns are negative in >50% of months where HOUST surpasses 1.3 million.

mechanism_narrative: When industrial production growth outpaces consumer credit expansion, it indicates supply-side efficiency gains and inventory drawdowns, which improve profit margins and drive positive equity returns.
failure_condition: The interaction term between INDPRO and RSAFS shows no predictive power for 60-day forward returns (p > 0.05 in multivariate regression).

mechanism_narrative: During periods of rapid GDP growth, strong employment gains amplify corporate earnings revisions, but if unemployment simultaneously rises, it signals a structural mismatch that reverses gains and drives negative returns.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS rises > 200k while UNRATE rises > 0.2pp in same month
failure_condition: SPX 20-day returns are positive in >55% of instances meeting the trigger condition.
